notes: Star Alliance partners, no fuel surcharges on most carriers including ANA and Lufthansa
Lufthansa, SWISS, or Turkish Business via Star Alliance. No fuel surcharges on most.
ANA Business Class (The Room) via Virgin Atlantic miles. No fuel surcharges. One of the best business class values available.
Park Hyatt Maldives, Category 6, per night. Transfers 1:1 from Chase UR.
Andaz Costa Rica, Category 4, per night. Transfers 1:1 from Chase UR.
Multiple Category 3 properties in Cancun/Riviera Maya. Great value per night.
Dynamic pricing — check at booking. Star Alliance partners. Prices vary widely by carrier and date.
Fully dynamic. Prices fluctuate significantly. Best value found off-peak on Delta metal.
Japan Airlines Business Class. One of the best-value fixed-rate redemptions still available.
British Airways, Iberia, or Finnair Business via oneworld. Watch for fuel surcharges on BA.
Park Hyatt Bangkok or Andaz Singapore, Category 5. Chase UR transfers 1:1 to Hyatt.
St. Regis Maldives Vommuli. Peak rates can be lower if you stay 5 nights (5th night free).
Short-haul AA partners to Caribbean islands from Miami/NYC. Distance-based pricing is great value under 1,151 miles.
Singapore Airlines regional Business Class within Southeast Asia. Excellent product.
Singapore Airlines Business (non-stop SFO-NRT or LAX-NRT). World-class product.
Avianca LifeMiles for United or Avianca Business to South America. No fuel surcharges.
Japan Airlines First Class via Alaska miles. One of the most coveted redemptions in the hobby.
Finnair or British Airways Business via Alaska miles. Watch for BA fuel surcharges.
Conrad Maldives Rangali Island. 5th night free makes this significantly better value.
Hilton moved to dynamic pricing. Great value at mid-tier properties. Check specific property before booking.
InterContinental Punta Cana or similar 5-star properties. IHG has a fixed peak/off-peak chart.
Japan Airlines or Qantas Business via oneworld. Good value for Qantas cardholders.
Short-haul Club Europe within Europe. Distance-based — flights under 1,151 miles. Fuel surcharges apply on BA.
AA operates direct flights to Bogotá, Lima, Buenos Aires, São Paulo, and Santiago. Dynamic pricing — book early for lower end of range.
Chase UR to United MileagePlus at 1:1. Dynamic pricing but short-haul fares are generally low.
Andaz Maui at Wailea Resort. Off-peak rates can drop to 17,000/night. Chase UR transfers 1:1 to Hyatt.
Hyatt Ziva and Zilara all-inclusive resorts in Cancún, Cap Cana, and Jamaica. Meals and drinks included — outstanding value.
Alila Seminyak and Alila Ubud. Stunning properties for relatively few points — one of the best hotel sweet spots in Asia.
Park Hyatt Paris Vendôme. One of the finest hotels in Paris — dynamic pricing but still exceptional value vs. cash rates.
Cathay Pacific Business Class via Alaska miles — oneworld partner. Excellent product to Hong Kong and Tokyo. No fuel surcharges.
LATAM Business Class to South America via Alaska's oneworld partner chart. Covers Colombia, Peru, Brazil, Argentina, Chile.
United flies nonstop to Hawaii from West Coast and some Midwest hubs. East Coast origins require a connection and will be at the higher end of this range.
Transatlantic economy on United or Star Alliance partners. Book saver-level availability for the low end of this range.
Delta nonstop to Honolulu and Maui from ATL, SLC, LAX, and SEA. From the East Coast expect 30,000+ due to connections.
Delta One Business Class to São Paulo, Buenos Aires, Lima, and Bogotá via Atlanta hub. Fully dynamic — book early and check multiple dates.
Short Caribbean routes from Atlanta, New York, and Boston. Dynamic pricing but short-haul keeps costs low.
Fixed-rate one-way economy on Air Canada or partner airlines. Reliable pricing — no fuel surcharges on most routes.
Distance-based Avios chart on AA-operated flights under 1,151 miles. One of the best short-haul domestic sweet spots — many city pairs covered.
Avios on AA-operated flights to Mexico and Central America. Distance-based pricing — most US-Mexico routes fall under 1,500 miles.
Citi ThankYou transfers 1:1 to Turkish Miles&Smiles. Use for Business Class on Star Alliance partners to Europe. Outstanding value with no fuel surcharges.
Citi ThankYou → Turkish Miles&Smiles → ANA Business Class to Japan. One of the best-kept sweet spots — 45,000 for a world-class product.
Amex MR transfers 1:1 to Air France/KLM Flying Blue. Monthly Promo Awards offer 25–50% discounts — US to Europe economy can drop below 20,000 pts.
Air France/KLM Flying Blue to Caribbean islands including Martinique, Guadeloupe, and Saint Martin. Great value on Promo Award months.
Singapore Airlines Business Class from US West Coast to Sydney or Melbourne via Singapore. One of the best premium cabin redemptions available.
Westin Maui Resort & Spa and The Ritz-Carlton Maui. Dynamic pricing — off-peak dates offer significantly better value.
Wide range of Marriott, Sheraton, and W properties across Europe. Dynamic pricing — smaller cities offer much better value than Paris or London.
InterContinental Maldives Maamunagau Resort. IHG's fixed peak/off-peak chart makes this predictable to plan.
Conrad and Waldorf Astoria properties in the Bahamas and Caribbean. 5th night free benefit significantly improves value on longer stays.
Fixed-rate one-way economy on Air Canada or United (Star Alliance partner) to Hawaii. No fuel surcharges.
AA flies nonstop to Honolulu, Maui, and Kona from West Coast hubs (LAX, SFO, PHX, DFW). East Coast travelers need a connection and should expect the higher end of this range.
